overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a robed character exploring a medieval castle interior. The character descends a winding stone staircase illuminated by warm lanterns, passing through an alcove with furniture, before entering a grand vaulted corridor with brick arches and chandeliers.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper castle corridor with wall lanterns

events.description: character transitions from walking straight to beginning descent down spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone corridor toward the spiral staircase entrance

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall with mortar lines
ornate wrought-iron wall sconce with warm yellow glow
dark wooden handrail along the left side of the corridor
curved stone archway leading to the descending spiral stairs

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone corridor illuminated by a wall-mounted lantern. The wooden railing lines the left side as the character approaches and begins to descend the spiral staircase ahead.

events.description: passing a small alcove with wooden cabinets, mirror, and fruit bowl on the left
approaching the brighter archway at the bottom of the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking down the spiral staircase, curving around the central stone column

entered.detail: curved stone wall of the spiral staircase with weathered texture
dark wooden cabinets with glass doors containing various items
section of red brick wall visible through worn plaster
stone archway at the bottom of the stairs leading to the lower level

segments.scene_description: The character descends the tight spiral staircase, curving around the central column. At around 15 seconds, a small alcove with wooden furniture and a fruit bowl appears on the left. The walls show exposed brick in sections as the character continues down toward the archway at the bottom.

scene_state.functional_zone: vaulted brick cellar corridor with chandeliers

events.description: exiting the spiral staircase and entering the large vaulted corridor with brick ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the vaulted corridor, observing the display cases and architecture

entered.detail: high arched ceiling made of red bricks with ribbed vaulting
ornate black iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from ceiling
recessed wall niche with glass front containing objects
thick stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling
stacked wooden barrels at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Passing through the archway, the scene opens into a grand corridor with a high vaulted brick ceiling and hanging iron chandeliers. The character walks past stone pillars and wall display cases, heading toward wooden barrels visible at the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped stone passageway down a winding staircase and into a vast, vaulted hall. It begins in a narrow corridor lit by a wall-mounted lantern, moving past a wooden railing as the character starts to descend a tight spiral staircase. As the camera curves around the central column, the space briefly opens into a small alcove featuring wooden furniture and a fruit bowl before continuing down toward a distant archway. The scene then expands as the character passes through the arch, shifting from the confined stairs into a grand corridor defined by high brick ceilings and hanging iron chandeliers. Finally, the camera glides past stone pillars and wall display cases, heading toward wooden barrels at the far end of the hall.
